story: STORY CLT-01 — Strategy Cluster Tree Read
description: Read-only widening of Strategy (Portfolio / Program / Review / Blocker / Dashboard) for users holding BOTH strategy.view + core.cluster_tree.view, mirroring the KPI 9-D-D1a pattern.

userStories.title: Strategy cluster_tree read widening (Portfolio / Program / Review / Blocker / Dashboard)
acceptanceCriteria: Parent org user with strategy.view + core.cluster_tree.view sees child org portfolios (index + show).
Parent org user with strategy.view + core.cluster_tree.view sees child org programs (index + show).
Parent org user with strategy.view + core.cluster_tree.view sees child org reviews (index + show).
Parent org user with strategy.view + core.cluster_tree.view sees child org blockers (index + show).
Child org cannot see parent org.

All Strategy write endpoints stay 403 cross-org (store / update / delete / priority / status / link / unlink / resolve / escalate / assignOwner / manageProjects / changePortfolio / manageWeight / changeStrategicStatus / forceClose).
No AccessDecision changes, no migrations, no SCOPE_CLUSTER revival, no excluded-module touches.
userStories.referenceImplementation: Phase 9-D-D1a — branch `phase-9d-d1a-kpi-cluster-tree-read` (merged via PR #6 → commit `79eb65e`). Mirror the same pattern in Strategy without touching AccessDecision.

nonGoals: Cluster_tree WIDENING to any other module (Projects / Risks / Meetings / Users come in their own stories CLT-02..CLT-05).
Any write path widening (create / update / delete / status / priority / link / unlink / resolve / escalate / assignOwner).
Tasks / OVR / Surveys / HR / ActivityLog touches (excluded or deferred).
stopConditions: Existing resource response includes sensitive fields
Current module has unclear authorization contract
Tests require deleting or weakening real security coverage
Any conflict with Direction R / Direction B / KPI cluster_tree behavior
Any CI failure that cannot be explained by the current story
mergeApproval: Tariq only — never auto-merge in this epic.
